description: Back in Afterlife, Skye struggles with Jiaying about rescuing Lincoln, fearing for his life in Hydra’s hands. Jiaying, burdened by her history with Hydra, explains why a rescue is too risky. She painfully admits she cannot endanger more people, and Skye is left desperately searching for a solution.

transcript.line: I don't understand. Why was Lincoln there?
Because of me. I asked him to go and protect you, to keep you safe. It was a mistake. I should never have let you go at all.
It was the right thing to do. We have to make sure that the Cal that we put out into the world is the same Cal that I've seen here. T-the safe and user-friendly Cal.
You were trying to make it easy on him. You were being compassionate.
How do we get Lincoln back?
We don't. It's too much of a risk.
You don... You don't understand. They will torture him. They will kill him.
I know exactly what HYDRA is capable of doing. I've carried the memory of what they did for decades.

And I wish I could save Lincoln from that, but I suspect somehow HYDRA is tracking Gordon's movements. Anyone I send will be at risk, too. And Lincoln wouldn't want me to. These people are important to him. He wouldn't want them to risk their lives. We can't rescue Lincoln, not now. I'm sorry.
